description: Solid cylinder shaft coupler with a stepped central bore, a flat keyway, and chamfered outer edges.
notes: Align the main cylinder axis with the Z-axis. Place the stepped bore coaxially. The 15mm diameter bore section spans Z = 0 to 30, and the 20mm diameter section spans Z = 30 to 70. The flat keyway should run the full 70mm length parallel to the Z-axis on the outer surface (reducing the local radius by 2mm over a width of 10mm). Apply a 1mm 45-degree chamfer to both outer circular end rims.
